body: This is important for writing robust and readable code in our time-stepping algorithm.
title: Make `construct_regionally` handle multiple return values

body: A recent PR broke the user-facing `diffusivity()` function for `SmagorinskyLilly` and this fixes it. It also adds a test to catch this in the future and exports `diffusivity()` at the `TurbulenceClosure` level, since it's a user-facing function.
title: Fixes `diffusivity()` for Smagorinsky-Lilly closure
